subcodes.title: Interview with W. H. Short at Hotel Ansonia in New York, 1912-04-15
subcodes.first_line: You are very welcome; am most happy to greet you. I have looked forward with much pleasure to this meeting
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
